content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line bending rightward, and the car appears well-positioned slightly left of center heading into the curve.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 24, target = (24 + 5) % 121 = 29
- Target waypoint 29: (7.1725, 1.2770)
- Car: x=6.6000, y=0.8277, heading=20.614°
- dy = 1.2770 - 0.8277 = 0.4493
- dx = 7.1725 - 6.6000 = 0.5725
- bearing = atan2(0.4493, 0.5725) = 38.11°
- delta = 38.11° - 20.614° = 17.50°
- |delta| ≈ 17.5° → moderate left, use 15° steering at speed 1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead but waypoint 29 is still to the left of current heading (delta=+17.5°), so maintaining 15° positive steering to follow the waypoint line into the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight heading due east (~0-5° heading)",
    "Sharp right curve begins around waypoints 26-32 (x=6.9-7.3, y=0.9-1.7)",
    "After the right curve, track goes west around y=2.7-4.5 then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Car is slightly left of center (~0.07m) — acceptable position entering right curve",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Need to prepare for right turn (negative steering) starting around WP32-36",
    "Heading is ~20° and rising — car is turning left slightly to follow waypoints",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.433, 6.480, 6.512, 6.560, 6.600],
    "y": [0.735, 0.755, 0.776, 0.800, 0.828],
    "yaw": [11.980, 14.200, 16.439, 18.500, 20.614]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP29 at (7.173, 1.277): dy=0.449, dx=0.573, bearing=38.11°, delta=+17.50° → moderate left correction",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
